---
title: "Torque v2.0 — Visualizations"
description: "Torque equation, threshold zones, and cascade integration diagrams"
doi: "10.5281/zenodo.17379750"
author: "Aaron M. Slusher"
date: "2025-10-15"
---

**Back to:** [Main Paper](index.html) | [Cross-References](torque-v2.0-cross-references.html) | [Bibliography](torque-v2.0-master-bibliography.html)

---

## Figure 1: The Torque Equation — Component Breakdown

Torque (τ) synthesizes three independent failure signals into a single real-time scalar. Unlike traditional monitoring that watches each signal separately, Torque detects cascade initiation 15–45 minutes earlier through composite signal amplification.

```{=html}
<svg width="100%" viewBox="0 0 680 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

  <!-- Formula banner -->
  <rect x="60" y="16" width="560" height="46" rx="8" fill="#131B2C" stroke="#F9C84A" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <text font-family="monospace" font-size="16" font-weight="700" x="340" y="36" text-anchor="middle" fill="#F9C84A">τ = √(v²_drift + (1 − cos(θ_align))²) × (1 − λ_damp)</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" x="340" y="54" text-anchor="middle" fill="#888">Range: [0, 1+] · unitless scalar · 60-second measurement windows</text>

  <!-- Component 1: v_drift -->
  <rect x="40" y="84" width="180" height="120" rx="8" fill="#FAECE7" stroke="#993C1D" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="700" x="130" y="108" text-anchor="middle" fill="#4A1B0C">v_drift</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" x="130" y="126" text-anchor="middle" fill="#712B13">Drift Velocity</text>
  <rect x="56" y="134" width="148" height="18" rx="3" fill="#993C1D" fill-opacity="0.12"/>
  <text font-family="monospace" font-size="9" x="130" y="147" text-anchor="middle" fill="#4A1B0C">v = Δd / Δt</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="9" x="130" y="166" text-anchor="middle" fill="#712B13">Rate of symbolic deviation</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="9" x="130" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#712B13">from baseline identity</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="9" x="130" y="196" text-anchor="middle" fill="#888">window: 5–15 min</text>

  <!-- Component 2: θ_align -->
  <rect x="250" y="84" width="180" height="120" rx="8" fill="#E6F1FB" stroke="#185FA5" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="700" x="340" y="108" text-anchor="middle" fill="#042C53">θ_align</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" x="340" y="126" text-anchor="middle" fill="#0C447C">Alignment Angle</text>
  <rect x="266" y="134" width="148" height="18" rx="3" fill="#185FA5" fill-opacity="0.12"/>
  <text font-family="monospace" font-size="8" x="340" y="147" text-anchor="middle" fill="#042C53">arccos(cur · int / |cur||int|)</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="9" x="340" y="166" text-anchor="middle" fill="#0C447C">Angular deviation from</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="9" x="340" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#0C447C">intended trajectory</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="9" x="340" y="196" text-anchor="middle" fill="#888">range: [0, π] · 0=perfect</text>

  <!-- Component 3: λ_damp -->
  <rect x="460" y="84" width="180" height="120" rx="8" fill="#E1F5EE" stroke="#0F6E56" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="700" x="550" y="108" text-anchor="middle" fill="#04342C">λ_damp</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" x="550" y="126" text-anchor="middle" fill="#085041">Recursive Damping</text>
  <rect x="476" y="134" width="148" height="18" rx="3" fill="#0F6E56" fill-opacity="0.12"/>
  <text font-family="monospace" font-size="9" x="550" y="147" text-anchor="middle" fill="#04342C">corrections / attempts</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="9" x="550" y="166" text-anchor="middle" fill="#085041">Self-correction capacity</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="9" x="550" y="180" text-anchor="middle" fill="#085041">Higher = more stable</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="9" x="550" y="196" text-anchor="middle" fill="#888">range: [0, 1]</text>

  <!-- Arrows down to synthesis -->
  <line x1="130" y1="204" x2="270" y2="255" stroke="#888" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <line x1="340" y1="204" x2="340" y2="255" stroke="#888" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <line x1="550" y1="204" x2="410" y2="255" stroke="#888" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <polygon points="265,252 270,260 275,252" fill="#888"/>
  <polygon points="335,252 340,260 345,252" fill="#888"/>
  <polygon points="405,252 410,260 415,252" fill="#888"/>

  <!-- Synthesis box -->
  <rect x="180" y="260" width="320" height="58" rx="8" fill="#534AB7" fill-opacity="0.12" stroke="#534AB7" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="700" x="340" y="284" text-anchor="middle" fill="#26215C">τ — Single Predictive Scalar</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" x="340" y="302" text-anchor="middle" fill="#3C3489">87% correlation to cascade · 15–45 min advance warning · 1,200+ incidents validated</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" x="340" y="314" text-anchor="middle" fill="#888">p &lt; 0.001 · non-linear scaling · multi-dimensional stability · damping responsiveness</text>
</svg>
```

*Figure 1: Three-component Torque equation. Each component captures an orthogonal failure mode — velocity (rate), alignment (angle), damping (self-correction). Their synthesis into τ detects cascade initiation 15–45 minutes before traditional drift detection triggers.*

---

## Figure 2: Four Operational Threshold Zones

```{=html}
<svg width="100%" viewBox="0 0 680 280" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

  <!-- Torque axis -->
  <line x1="60" y1="140" x2="620" y2="140" stroke="#555" stroke-width="2"/>

  <!-- Zone fills -->
  <!-- Safe: 0–0.15 = 0 to 84px -->
  <rect x="60" y="100" width="84" height="80" rx="0" fill="#2ecc71" fill-opacity="0.15"/>
  <!-- Caution: 0.15–0.30 = 84 to 168px -->
  <rect x="144" y="100" width="84" height="80" fill="#f39c12" fill-opacity="0.15"/>
  <!-- Warning: 0.30–0.64 = 168 to 358px -->
  <rect x="228" y="100" width="190" height="80" fill="#e67e22" fill-opacity="0.15"/>
  <!-- Critical: 0.64+ = 418px onwards -->
  <rect x="418" y="100" width="202" height="80" fill="#E24B4A" fill-opacity="0.15" rx="0"/>

  <!-- Zone borders -->
  <line x1="144" y1="80" x2="144" y2="220" stroke="#888" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4 2"/>
  <line x1="228" y1="80" x2="228" y2="220" stroke="#888" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4 2"/>
  <line x1="418" y1="80" x2="418" y2="220" stroke="#888" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4 2"/>

  <!-- Axis labels -->
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" x="60" y="158" text-anchor="middle" fill="#555">0</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" x="144" y="158" text-anchor="middle" fill="#555">0.15</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" x="228" y="158" text-anchor="middle" fill="#555">0.30</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" x="418" y="158" text-anchor="middle" fill="#555">0.64</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" x="620" y="158" text-anchor="middle" fill="#555">τ →</text>

  <!-- Zone labels -->
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="700" x="102" y="120" text-anchor="middle" fill="#27ae60">SAFE</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="9" x="102" y="134" text-anchor="middle" fill="#27ae60">τ &lt; 0.15</text>

  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="700" x="186" y="120" text-anchor="middle" fill="#e67e22">CAUTION</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="9" x="186" y="134" text-anchor="middle" fill="#e67e22">0.15–0.30</text>

  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="700" x="323" y="116" text-anchor="middle" fill="#d35400">WARNING</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="9" x="323" y="130" text-anchor="middle" fill="#d35400">0.30–0.64</text>

  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="700" x="519" y="120" text-anchor="middle" fill="#c0392b">CRITICAL</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="9" x="519" y="134" text-anchor="middle" fill="#c0392b">τ ≥ 0.64</text>

  <!-- Action labels below -->
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="9" x="102" y="174" text-anchor="middle" fill="#555">Routine monitoring</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="9" x="186" y="174" text-anchor="middle" fill="#555">Enhanced monitoring</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="9" x="323" y="174" text-anchor="middle" fill="#555">Containment protocols</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="9" x="519" y="174" text-anchor="middle" fill="#c0392b">Phoenix Protocol</text>

  <!-- Critical threshold annotations -->
  <!-- Phoenix trigger at 0.30 -->
  <rect x="158" y="54" width="140" height="36" rx="4" fill="#e67e22" fill-opacity="0.15" stroke="#e67e22" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="9" font-weight="600" x="228" y="68" text-anchor="middle" fill="#d35400">Phoenix Trigger τ=0.30</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="9" x="228" y="82" text-anchor="middle" fill="#888">98.2% recovery · 87% context</text>
  <line x1="228" y1="90" x2="228" y2="100" stroke="#e67e22" stroke-width="1"/>

  <!-- Emergency threshold at 0.64 -->
  <rect x="338" y="54" width="160" height="36" rx="4" fill="#E24B4A" fill-opacity="0.12" stroke="#E24B4A" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="9" font-weight="600" x="418" y="68" text-anchor="middle" fill="#c0392b">Emergency τ=0.64</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="9" x="418" y="82" text-anchor="middle" fill="#888">73% recovery · 40–60% context loss</text>
  <line x1="418" y1="90" x2="418" y2="100" stroke="#E24B4A" stroke-width="1"/>

  <!-- Bottom note -->
  <rect x="60" y="230" width="560" height="24" rx="4" fill="#f9f9f9" stroke="#ddd" stroke-width="0.5"/>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" x="340" y="246" text-anchor="middle" fill="#555">87% correlation to cascade events · 15–45 min early warning · validated across 1,200+ operational incidents</text>
</svg>
```

*Figure 2: Four operational threshold zones. The Phoenix trigger (τ=0.30) is the critical intervention point — above it, cascade dynamics require external correction. The emergency threshold (τ=0.64) marks where cascades achieve self-sustaining momentum and recovery becomes uncertain.*

---

## Figure 3: Torque as Universal Infrastructure — Four Framework Integrations

```{=html}
<svg width="100%" viewBox="0 0 680 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <marker id="arr-t" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="5" markerHeight="5" orient="auto">
      <path d="M1 2L8 5L1 8" fill="none" stroke="#F9C84A" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <!-- Torque core -->
  <rect x="230" y="140" width="220" height="70" rx="10" fill="#131B2C" stroke="#F9C84A" stroke-width="2"/>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="700" x="340" y="165" text-anchor="middle" fill="#F9C84A">TORQUE v2.0</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10" x="340" y="182" text-anchor="middle" fill="#aaa">τ = √(v²_drift + (1−cos θ)²) × (1−λ)</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="9" x="340" y="200" text-anchor="middle" fill="#888">Universal coherence measurement infrastructure</text>

  <!-- UCA (top left) -->
  <rect x="30" y="30" width="180" height="80" rx="8" fill="#EEEDFE" stroke="#534AB7" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="600" x="120" y="54" text-anchor="middle" fill="#26215C">UCA v3.1</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="9" x="120" y="70" text-anchor="middle" fill="#3C3489">Universal Cognitive Architecture</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="9" x="120" y="84" text-anchor="middle" fill="#3C3489">89% harmony · 98% sync resilience</text>
  <rect x="46" y="90" width="148" height="14" rx="3" fill="#534AB7" fill-opacity="0.12"/>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="8" x="120" y="101" text-anchor="middle" fill="#26215C">Continuous stability validation</text>

  <!-- SLV (top right) -->
  <rect x="470" y="30" width="180" height="80" rx="8" fill="#E6F1FB" stroke="#185FA5" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="600" x="560" y="54" text-anchor="middle" fill="#042C53">SLV v1.2</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="9" x="560" y="70" text-anchor="middle" fill="#0C447C">Sovereign Lattice Veil</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="9" x="560" y="84" text-anchor="middle" fill="#0C447C">90% detection · &lt;2% false positive</text>
  <rect x="476" y="90" width="148" height="14" rx="3" fill="#185FA5" fill-opacity="0.12"/>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="8" x="560" y="101" text-anchor="middle" fill="#042C53">Torque → Phase 2 activation</text>

  <!-- CSFC (bottom left) -->
  <rect x="30" y="250" width="180" height="80" rx="8" fill="#FAEEDA" stroke="#BA7517" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="600" x="120" y="274" text-anchor="middle" fill="#412402">CSFC</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="9" x="120" y="290" text-anchor="middle" fill="#633806">Complete Symbolic Fracture Cascade</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="9" x="120" y="304" text-anchor="middle" fill="#633806">99% Stage 1 prevention</text>
  <rect x="46" y="310" width="148" height="14" rx="3" fill="#BA7517" fill-opacity="0.12"/>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="8" x="120" y="321" text-anchor="middle" fill="#412402">τ maps to 6 cascade stages</text>

  <!-- Phoenix (bottom right) -->
  <rect x="470" y="250" width="180" height="80" rx="8" fill="#FAECE7" stroke="#993C1D" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="600" x="560" y="274" text-anchor="middle" fill="#4A1B0C">Phoenix v2.0</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="9" x="560" y="290" text-anchor="middle" fill="#712B13">Recovery Protocol</text>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="9" x="560" y="304" text-anchor="middle" fill="#712B13">98.2% success · 87% context</text>
  <rect x="476" y="310" width="148" height="14" rx="3" fill="#993C1D" fill-opacity="0.12"/>
  <text font-family="sans-serif" font-size="8" x="560" y="321" text-anchor="middle" fill="#4A1B0C">Triggers when τ &lt; 0.30</text>

  <!-- Arrows from Torque to each framework -->
  <line x1="230" y1="160" x2="210" y2="100" stroke="#F9C84A" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arr-t)"/>
  <line x1="450" y1="160" x2="470" y2="100" stroke="#F9C84A" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arr-t)"/>
  <line x1="260" y1="210" x2="210" y2="270" stroke="#F9C84A" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arr-t)"/>
  <line x1="420" y1="210" x2="470" y2="270" stroke="#F9C84A" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arr-t)"/>
</svg>
```

*Figure 3: Torque as universal measurement infrastructure. The same τ scalar drives four distinct frameworks — detection (UCA), defense (SLV), cascade mapping (CSFC), and recovery (Phoenix). No framework operates independently; all receive Torque readings as their core input.*

---

## Key Statistics Reference

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| **Predictive accuracy** | 87% correlation to cascade events |
| **Early warning window** | 15–45 minutes before failure |
| **Incidents validated** | 1,200+ |
| **Statistical significance** | p &lt; 0.001 |
| **Phoenix trigger** | τ = 0.30 → 98.2% recovery |
| **Emergency threshold** | τ = 0.64 → 73% recovery |
| **UCA harmony score** | 89% |
| **SLV detection rate** | 90% (< 2% false positives) |
| **CSFC Stage 1 prevention** | 99% |
| **Measurement window** | 60 seconds continuous |

---

*© 2025 Aaron M. Slusher, ValorGrid Solutions. [Main Paper](index.html) | DOI: [10.5281/zenodo.17379750](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.17379750)*
